answerBlocks.answerSummary: Defined evolution as a process of gradual change from simple to complex life forms. Listed drivers such as variation, speciation, natural selection, and genetic drift. Described fossils as preserved traces providing evolutionary proof, using Archaeopteryx as an intermediate link and noting relative depth layering (Ammonite, trilobite, Rajasaurus).
satisfies: Explains mechanism of occurrence (selection, drift, variations)
Details fossil evidence with specific examples (Archaeopteryx, layering)

earnedMarks.reason: Thorough discussion addressing definition, mechanisms, and fossil evidence.

answerBlocks.answerSummary: Defined placenta as a disc-like tissue embedded in the uterine wall. Described its structure containing villi on the embryo side and blood spaces on the mother's side. Detailed its functions in transferring glucose/oxygen to the fetus and removing metabolic waste.
satisfies: Describes villi and maternal blood spaces structure

earnedMarks.reason: Addresses definition, structural attributes, and maternal-fetal exchange roles.

answerBlocks.answerSummary: Identified P = Ethanol, Q = Ethene, R = Ethane based on the combustion ratio ($1\text{ R} \rightarrow 2\text{ CO}_2 + 3\text{ H}_2\text{O}$). Wrote the balanced equation for dehydration of P to Q using conc. $H_2SO_4$, addition reaction of Q to R with a Nickel catalyst, and the complete combustion equation of R.
satisfies: Correctly identifies P, Q, and R
Writes balanced chemical equation for dehydration

earnedMarks.reason: All compounds identified correctly and backed by proper balanced equations.

answerBlocks.answerSummary: Defined atmospheric refraction as the bending of light rays passing through layers of varying atmospheric density. Accompanied both with descriptive structural diagrams.
satisfies: Explains twinkling of stars with an illustrative diagram
Explains advanced sunrise/delayed sunset with an illustrative diagram

earnedMarks.reason: Comprehensive textual insights paired with complete structural ray layouts.
